input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.9.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.9.2.1
            TITLE: the shutdown circuit must open upon operation of, or detection from any of the components

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.9.2.1: The Shutdown Circuit must Open upon operation of, or detection from any of the components
IC.9.2.1 The Shutdown Circuit must Open upon operation of, or detection from any of the components 
listed in IC.9.1.1

final_answer: rule IC.9.2.1: The Shutdown Circuit must Open upon operation of, or detection from any of the components listed in IC.9.1.1
